claim_bullets.bullet_text: Sorcerer skill requires joining guild or apprenticing to 6th level sorcerer. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.153-153)
Sorcerer training requires 2000 experience points. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.153-153)
Shaman skill requires teaching from 1st level shaman. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.153-153)

source_record_text: This section details how to acquire and increase levels for rune master skills, including sorcerer, shaman, priest, dark priest, and dragon priest skills. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.154-155)
